requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — CSA/SCC-accredited certification and provincial acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — CSA/SCC认可认证及省级接受
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — CSA/SCC認可認證及省級接受

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices that connect to mains power, chargers, adapters, batteries, or external power supplies may need Canadian electrical safety certification through a recognized certification body, commonly using CSA/ULC or equivalent Canadian standards. Provincial and territorial electrical safety authorities control acceptance of electrical products in local markets, while federal consumer product safety law can apply to consumer hazards.
summary.zh: 连接市电、充电器、适配器、电池或外部电源的无线及物联网设备，可能需要通过认可认证机构按CSA/ULC或等效加拿大标准取得电气安全认证。省和地区电气安全主管机关负责本地市场对电气产品的接受，联邦消费品安全法律也可能适用于消费品危害。
summary.zht: 連接市電、充電器、適配器、電池或外部電源的無線及物聯網裝置，可能需要通過認可認證機構按CSA/ULC或等效加拿大標準取得電氣安全認證。省和地區電氣安全主管機關負責本地市場對電氣產品的接受，聯邦消費品安全法律也可能適用於消費品危害。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (S.C. 2010, c. 21)
CSA C22.2 / CAN/CSA electrical safety standards as applicable to the product
SCC-accredited or otherwise recognized certification body mark for Canadian electrical acceptance
Provincial and territorial electrical safety requirements

summary.en: China CCC certification may cover electrical safety for products within the CCC catalogue, and Chinese battery or power-supply standards may apply. CCC evidence does not automatically show compliance with Canadian electrical codes, Canadian deviations, certification body marking, or provincial acceptance rules.
summary.zh: 中国CCC认证可能覆盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全，中国电池或电源标准也可能适用。CCC证据不能自动证明符合加拿大电气规范、加拿大差异要求、认证机构标志或省级接受规则。
summary.zht: 中國CCC認證可能覆蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全，中國電池或電源標準也可能適用。CCC證據不能自動證明符合加拿大電氣規範、加拿大差異要求、認證機構標誌或省級接受規則。

standards_or_laws: China CCC certification for covered electrical and electronic products
GB 4943.1 or other applicable Chinese electrical safety standards
Chinese lithium battery and power adapter standards where applicable

gap.en: A China-market CCC file should be reviewed against Canadian electrical safety standards and provincial acceptance expectations. The Canadian bill of materials, plug, power supply, enclosure, markings, warnings, and certification mark must match the certified construction accepted for Canada.
gap.zh: 应将中国市场CCC文件与加拿大电气安全标准及省级接受预期逐项比对。加拿大销售版本的物料清单、插头、电源、外壳、标识、警示和认证标志必须与加拿大接受的认证结构一致。
gap.zht: 應將中國市場CCC文件與加拿大電氣安全標準及省級接受預期逐項比對。加拿大銷售版本的物料清單、插頭、電源、外殼、標示、警示和認證標誌必須與加拿大接受的認證結構一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where electrical product safety certification or provincial acceptance applies; federal consumer product safety obligations may also apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where the device or its power components fall within China CCC or other compulsory safety regimes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canadian electrical safety is not covered by ISED radio approval. For mains-powered or charging products, plan a separate Canadian safety review and certification path before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大电气安全不由ISED无线电批准覆盖。对于市电供电或充电类产品，应在出货前规划独立的加拿大安全评估和认证路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大電氣安全不由ISED無線電批准覆蓋。對於市電供電或充電類產品，應在出貨前規劃獨立的加拿大安全評估和認證路徑。

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada
